productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Polka Green Flip Flops
description: The Polka flip flop from adidas is created for the carefree at heart, offering exemplary comfort and style. Pair it with a tee and your favourite slept-in style denims. Upper Textured rubber straps in a thong style, with a toe separator PU footbed for cushioned comfort Polka dot printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with geometrical lugs for maximum traction flip flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
